items.name: button
items.title: Corti Button
items.description: Shadcn/ui button exposed through the Corti registry.

items.name: theme-core
items.title: Corti Theme Core
items.description: Shared semantic variables used by Corti themes.

items.name: theme-console
items.title: Corti Console Theme
items.description: Default shadcn-style light and dark themes under the Corti theme namespace.

items.name: theme-assistant
items.title: Corti Assistant Theme
items.description: Blue assistant light and dark themes.

items.name: theme-showcase
items.title: Corti Showcase Theme
items.description: Playful 90s 8-bit inspired showcase themes using IBM Plex Mono typography and square edges.

html[data-theme=\"corti-showcase-light\".--font-sans: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
html[data-theme=\"corti-showcase-light\".--font-mono: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

html[data-theme=\"corti-showcase-dark\"].--font-sans: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
html[data-theme=\"corti-showcase-dark\"].--font-mono: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

html[data-theme^=\"corti-showcase\"].font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

html[data-theme^=\"corti-showcase\"] :is.font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

items.name: theme-retro-arcade
items.title: Corti Retro Arcade Theme
items.description: High-contrast 80s arcade-inspired neon theme with pixel edges, bold contrast, and synthwave gradients.

html[data-theme^=\"corti-retro-arcade\"].background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 12%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 14%, transparent), transparent 36%), radial-gradient(circle at 85% 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 20%, transparent), transparent 42%), linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--background) 84%, #000), var(--background))

items.name: theme-classic
items.title: Corti Classic Theme
items.description: Accessible desktop UI themes inspired by late 90s operating systems with beveled chrome and restrained motion.

html[data-theme=\"corti-classic-light\"].--font-sans: "MS Sans Serif", Tahoma, Verdana, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

html[data-theme=\"corti-classic-dark\"].--font-sans: "MS Sans Serif", Tahoma, Verdana, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

html[data-theme^=\"corti-classic\"].font-family: "MS Sans Serif", Tahoma, Verdana, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

html[data-theme^=\"corti-classic\"] body.background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--classic-highlight) 22%, transparent), transparent 160px)

html[data-theme^=\"corti-classic\"] :is(.font-family: "MS Sans Serif", Tahoma, Verdana, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

html[data-theme^=\"corti-classic\"] :is(.box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 var(--classic-highlight), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--classic-shadow-deep), inset 2px 2px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--classic-face) 84%, var(--classic-highlight)), inset -2px -2px 0 var(--classic-shadow)

inset 1px 1px 0 var(--classic-shadow-deep), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--classic-highlight), inset 2px 2px 0 var(--classic-shadow), inset -2px -2px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--classic-face) 84%, var(--classic-highlight))

inset 1px 1px 0 var(--classic-highlight), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--classic-shadow-deep), inset 2px 2px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--classic-face) 84%, var(--classic-highlight)), inset -2px -2px 0 var(--classic-shadow)

html[data-theme^=\"corti-classic\"] [dat.box-shadow: inset 1px 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--classic-face) 82%, var(--classic-highlight)), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--classic-shadow-deep)

inset 1px 1px 0 var(--classic-shadow-deep), inset -1px -1px 0 var(--classic-highlight), inset 2px 2px 0 var(--classic-shadow), inset -2px -2px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--classic-face) 84%, var(--classic-highlight))
